scenarios.goal: reduce friction before a new user creates their first project
scenarios.reason: A bounded activation problem should use the First Value Sprint goal.

scenarios.goal: review this onboarding flow and fix its biggest dead end
scenarios.reason: The request names one onboarding obstacle and outcome.

scenarios.goal: make the goal picker usable at mobile width
scenarios.reason: A small-screen blocker should use the Mobile Journey Rescue goal.

scenarios.goal: repair the clipped primary action in this responsive flow
scenarios.reason: The visible responsive blocker is explicit.

scenarios.goal: make this card match the rest of the product
scenarios.reason: Existing product patterns should guide a consistency pass.

scenarios.goal: align this page with our existing visual language
scenarios.reason: The request is visual alignment, not new interaction design.

scenarios.goal: build a clickable onboarding concept for one user path
scenarios.reason: A working interaction concept should use the Clickable Flow Prototype goal.

scenarios.goal: turn this workflow sketch into a reviewable local prototype
scenarios.reason: The output is a bounded prototype.

scenarios.goal: find themes in these numbered customer interview notes
scenarios.reason: Local customer evidence should become traceable themes.

scenarios.goal: synthesize this feedback set into one product decision
scenarios.reason: The task is feedback synthesis for a decision.

scenarios.goal: compare competitor onboarding flows with cited evidence
scenarios.reason: Current competitor research requires cited evidence.

scenarios.goal: research how three products position verification
scenarios.reason: A narrow external comparison should create a competitor brief.

scenarios.goal: create three positioning concepts from this customer research
scenarios.reason: The task is message direction, not content repurposing.

scenarios.goal: tighten the landing page message for one audience
scenarios.reason: The output is a focused landing-page concept.

scenarios.goal: turn this article into a LinkedIn draft in our brand voice
scenarios.reason: Repurposing an approved source belongs in the Source-to-Content Pack goal.

scenarios.goal: repurpose this approved transcript into three content formats
scenarios.reason: One source becomes several draft formats.

scenarios.goal: audit this csv for missing and duplicate values
scenarios.reason: The request is dataset quality inspection.

scenarios.goal: create a read-only quality snapshot for this spreadsheet
scenarios.reason: A non-mutating spreadsheet audit is explicit.

scenarios.goal: turn these ab test results into a cautious decision brief
scenarios.reason: Experiment evidence should become a bounded decision.

scenarios.goal: verify the experiment metrics and recommend the next step
scenarios.reason: The task combines metric checking with an experiment decision.

scenarios.goal: turn these messy handoff notes into an sop
scenarios.reason: Process notes should become an operating procedure.

scenarios.goal: convert this process transcript into a reviewable procedure
scenarios.reason: The requested artifact is a procedure.

scenarios.goal: find the biggest gap between these support questions and our faq
scenarios.reason: The task compares support demand with current coverage.

scenarios.goal: draft one missing support answer without sending it
scenarios.reason: The output is a review-only support answer.

scenarios.goal: fix data quality validation test
scenarios.reason: An explicit failing-test repair belongs to the advanced engineering loop library.

scenarios.goal: implement a clickable prototype component and run tests
scenarios.reason: An implementation request with repository tests must not be captured by a creative prototype goal.
